title: Native Plugin Development for Antigravity
description: Develop a native plugin for the antigravity application similar to the existing OpenClaw plugin.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Native Plugin Development for Antigravity (DEM-2026-0082)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to develop a native plugin for the Antigravity application, modeled after the existing OpenClaw plugin. The enhancement will improve application performance and integration within our infrastructure.

Business Value  
By creating a native plugin, we expect increased efficiency, reduced latency, and better user experience, directly supporting operational goals. This will also enable smoother maintenance and future scalability.

Risk Mitigation  
Medium risks related to development complexity will be managed through phased implementation and rigorous testing. Close collaboration with the existing OpenClaw plugin team will ensure knowledge transfer and minimize integration issues.
